message:
test(proptest): expand resize_scheduler from 18 to 24 property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 6 new property tests: interactive-before-background priority ordering,
supersession detection, overload admission cap, lifecycle event stage
ordering (Queued first), phase progression (Reflowing→Presenting→complete),
and deferral aging for background work force-scheduling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
